item.title: Unveiling Perspectives: Advanced Malware Masterclass Workshops in Istanbul & Ankara
item.description: We hosted 2 Advanced Malware Masterclass Workshops in Istanbul & Ankara. Here is how they went.

item.title: The Importance of Multi-OS Sandbox Solutions in Today's Cybersecurity
item.description: As organizations expand, so does their attack surface. Protect your entire infrastructure with multi-OS sandboxing.

item.title: Testing Antivirus with Malwation MSP
item.description: MSP stands for Malware Simulation Platform and it’s designed to create sophisticated and customizable malwares on cloud for testing and comparing antiviruses...

item.title: Technical Analysis of Phishing Campaigns Targeting the Defense Industry Delivering Snake Keylogger
Static Malware Analysis vs Dynamic Malware Analysis - Comparison Chart
item.description: Learn about the main differences between static and dynamic malware analysis with their pros and cons to understand why both are essential.

item.title: Simplest Yet Most Common and Effective Evasion Tactic: Sleep!
item.description: In this blog post, you will learn how "Sleep" function is used to evade detection with real-life examples and how to overcome it!

item.title: Reflections of Virus Bulletin 2024 from our Head of Revops’ POV: A Unique Experience in Security
item.description: I had a great experience at Virus Bulletin 2024, here is my recap of the event including key insights, networking, and our team's talk.

item.title: Overview of Malware Landscape in First Half of 2024
item.description: Learn the Malware Landscape in the first Half of 2024 from this blog post with malware types and malware families and their real-time samples.

item.title: Overcome the Detection Challenges of EDR and Antivirus Tools with Malwation CDR
item.description: In today’s rapidly evolving digital landscape, the battle between cybercriminals and cybersecurity professionals continues to intensify.

item.title: Origins of A Logger - Agent Tesla
item.description: Recent research by Berk Albayrak and Utku Corbaci, the team members of Malwation Threat Research (MTR) team has focused on BEC attacks targeting the company's employees. You can find the white paper from their findings in this post.

item.title: Offensive Approach to Online Sandboxes
item.description: In this blog, we will share our research about manipulating online sandboxes and how to automatize this process with MSP.

item.title: New MuddyWater Campaigns After Operation Swords of Iron
item.description: MuddyWater APT targets critical sectors with spear-phishing attacks using RMM tools. Stay vigilant against BEC threats with the information in this blog post.

item.title: Meet Malwation in Dublin - Gold Sponsor for Virus Bulletin 2024
item.description: Meet Malwation at Virus Bulletin 2024 in Dublin and explore our malware analysis innovations.

item.title: Malwation is a Proud Member of AMTSO
item.description: We are thrilled to announce that Malwation is now a proud member of the Anti-Malware Testing Standards Organization (AMTSO)!

item.title: Malwation 3rd Investment Announcement
item.description: Malwation is proud to announce the successful completion of its third investment round, a significant milestone that underscores the...

item.title: Introducing the Syscalls Feature in Threat.Zone: Unveiling Granular Malware Analysis
item.description: Introducing Syscalls: Gain deep insights into malware with Threat.Zone's new feature for advanced threat analysis!

item.title: Introducing Our New URL Scan Feature in Threat.Zone
item.description: Proud to present Threat.Zone’s new feature: URL Scan. You can fetch and analyze files from URLs, plus URL Reputation & Threat Analysis with Threat.Zone's URL Analysis feature.

item.title: Highlights from the 9th e-Safe Cybersecurity Summit
item.description: Here are the highlights of the 9th e-Safe Cybersecurity Summit from where we returned with an award for year's cybersecurity product, Threat.Zone-in Malware Detection/Analysis.

item.title: From Crime Scene to Cyber Scene: How the CSI Module Speeds Up Malware Forensics
item.description: Speed up malware forensics with Threat.Zone's CSI module: rapid access to artifacts, tools, and secure analysis.

item.title: Cortex XSOAR & MALWATION AIMA Integration
item.description: Accelerate malware analysis, detection and response processes by integrating Cortex XSOAR with AIMA.

item.title: Content Disarm and Reconstruction (CDR): Nice-to-Have or Must Have? What is the Cost of No Action?
item.description: What is CDR? Is it a nice-to-have or a must have? What are the risks of no actions? We gathered them all in this blog post!

item.title: ACH Analysis of Lockbit Attacks in Turkey
item.description: Analyzing claims of LockBit ransomware targeting Turkey post-OpCronos. False flags or real attacks? Let's see!

item.title: Advanced Malware Traffic Analysis
item.description: We explained how Threat.Zone’s Advanced Malware Traffic Analysis enhances malware detection with real-life samples and insights. Check it out now!
